# Support

For normal open-source questions, use this repository's issues.

For a focused paid review of a Python RAG/LLM application:

- Review page: https://x2.brucelu.top/rag/?source=github-support-my-rag
- Sample review: https://x2.brucelu.top/rag/sample/?source=github-support-my-rag
- Ask first: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=rag&source=github-support-my-rag
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/rag/checkout/?source=github-support-my-rag

Do not post API tokens, crawler credentials, object storage keys, vector database credentials, private source data, generated answers from protected content, or proprietary logs in public issues.
